#set heading(numbering: "1.")
#set math.equation(numbering: "(1)")

= Aligned Mathematical Structures

Source-backed grouped formula sample

== Expressions

Expression 1. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

`\Delta_{(n-1 l+1)}^{(1)}(x_1,\cdots,x_m|z_1,\cdots,z_{n-1}|z_n,\cdots,z_N) = q^{l-n+1}\sum_{k=n}^{N} z_k\frac{\prod_{j=1}^{n-1}(z_k-z_j q^{-2})}{\prod_{\scriptstyle{i=n}\atop \scriptstyle{i\ne k}}^{N} (z_i-z_k)q^{-1}}\Delta^{(n l)}(x_1,\cdots,x_m|z_1,\cdots, z_{n-1},z_k|z_{n},\mathop{\hat{\cdots}}^{k},z_N)`

Expression 2. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

`[\alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(a),\alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(b),[x,y,z]_{\mathcal{L}}]_{\mathcal{L}} = [[a,b,x]_{\mathcal{L}}, \alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(y), \alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(z)]_{\mathcal{L}}+ [\alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(x),[a,b,y]_{\mathcal{L}},\alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(z)]_{\mathcal{L}}+[\alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(x),\alpha_{\mathcal{L}}(y),[a,b,z]_{\mathcal{L}}]_{\mathcal{L}}`

Expression 3. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

`(II) \left(\begin{array}{c}x_1+{\rm i}y_1 \\x_2+{\rm i}y_2 \\x_3+{\rm i}y_3 \\x_4+{\rm i}y_4\end{array}\right) \leftrightarrow \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\left(\begin{array}{c}-(y_2+y_4) +{\rm j}(y_2-y_4) \\(y_1 + y_3) -{\rm j}(y_1-y_3) \\(x_2 + x_4) -{\rm j}(x_2 - x_4) \\-(x_1 + x_3) +{\rm j}(x_1 - x_3)\end{array}\right)`

Expression 4. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

`(|\partial_t^{\ell}\mathcal{D}^{\alpha}\phi|^2)_t = -2\sum\limits_{\ell_1+|\alpha_1|>0}\partial_t^{\ell}\mathcal{D}^{\alpha}\phi\partial_t^{\ell_1}\mathcal{D}^{\alpha_1}v\cdot\nabla(\partial_t^{\ell_2}\mathcal{D}^{\alpha_2}\phi)-v\cdot\nabla|\partial_t^{\ell}\mathcal{D}^{\alpha}\phi|^2`

Expression 5. The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

`{\rm Tr}\, [\Gamma_{s}(P^{a})\Gamma_{s}(P_{b})]= \delta^{a}{}_{b} \Rightarrow \Gamma_{s}(P^{a}) = \frac{-i}{2g}\gamma^{a}`

`{\rm Tr}\, [\Gamma_{s}(M^{ab})\Gamma_{s}(P_{cd})]= \delta^{ab}{}_{cd} \Rightarrow \Gamma_{s}(M^{ab}) = -\frac{1}{2}\gamma^{ab}`
